title: KV Schooling — Kendriya Vidyalaya
description: Completed schooling at Kendriya Vidyalaya. Built a foundation in science and mathematics before pursuing engineering.

title: Enrolled at MIT-WPU, Computer Engineering
description: Started B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering at MIT World Peace University, Pune.

title: Peer Tutor — Maths, C++, Python, ML, R
description: Peer tutored foundational subjects including Mathematics I/II/III, Introduction to C++, Python, R, Tableau, Basic Machine Learning, and Database Management.

title: Freelancer — Software & Web Projects
description: Started freelancing on software and web development alongside college. Delivered client projects throughout college years — the Trek Recommendation System was one such engagement.

title: Yale, Wesleyan & Duke — Psychology Certifications
description: Completed Introduction to Psychology (Yale), Social Psychology with Honors (Wesleyan), and Business Metrics for Data-Driven Companies (Duke) during COVID lockdown. The beginning of behavioral research.

title: Domino's Data Leak — Behavior Tracing Catalyst
description: Domino's India data breach exposed 13 crore consumer records. Sparked behavior tracing as a formal research direction — mapping what data reveals about people, not just what people say.

title: RA — Data Warehouse Lab, MIT-WPU
description: Invited by Prof. Varsha (Data Warehousing & Data Management) to join the lab as Research Assistant after an impressive semester project on psychological market basket analysis. Led a 30-month behavioral research initiative analyzing 10,000+ individual responses.

title: HelpingWind — Social Media & Content
description: First formal work role. Managed social media and content writing for HelpingWind. Covered SEO, web content, and digital marketing.

title: Haar Cascade Research — Smart Voting System
description: Began surveying 14 face recognition methods to solve India's duplicate vote challenge. Built a Haar Cascade + LBPH pipeline in Python + OpenCV to enforce biometric one-person-one-vote verification.

title: Open Research Forum — 1,000+ Peer Interviews
description: Founded a research forum for structured behavioral Q&A data collection. Conducted 1,000+ video interviews across students from diverse academic backgrounds mapping decision-making patterns.

title: Conversational Bot — T5 Model + Skinner's CBT
description: Built a multilingual conversational bot using T5, grounded in B.F. Skinner's cognitive behavior theory. Interpreted emotional and linguistic cues to generate behavioral statistical reports. Named 'Speak It Out.'

title: Behavioral Psychology Paper — Springer IACC
description: Published ML-based behavioral clustering across 1,438 respondents. Five behavioral clusters identified; 41% 'merciful-silent' type. COVID shifted cultural values — family rose above success. CCIS vol. 1528.

title: Face Recognition Paper — IEEE Smart GENCON
description: Presented at IEEE Smart GENCON 2021, Pune. LBPH achieved 93.33% accuracy in the wearable-device domain, outperforming FisherFace. Single-face model validated for Smart Voting deployment.

title: TechHut — Full-Stack Developer Intern
description: Built a MERN application for real-time cryptocurrency price tracking. Implemented filtering API with MongoDB, built the React frontend.

title: AI / ML Freelancer — Active Period
description: Active freelance period handling NLP, ML, and data pipeline projects for independent clients. Delivered the Trek Recommendation System among other engagements.

title: IdeaIn10 Runner-Up — IET Pune, 'Speak It Out'
description: Secured second place at IET Pune Chapter Ideathon for Speak It Out — a conversational empathy model. Recognition led to university funding pursuit via Smart India Hackathon.

title: AI Research Intern — C-DAC Pune
description: Final Year Project at C-DAC Applied AI Group (Strategic Projects Group, Ministry of Electronics & IT, Govt. of India), sponsored by Dr. Krishnanjan Bhattacharjee (Joint Director, SPG) after IdeaIn10 caught his attention. Researched Domain Identification for Named Entity Disambiguation using DistilBERT + Zero-Shot classification across 6 domains on an 11,000+ dataset. Achieved 99.24% domain classification accuracy and 93% NER. Built an autonomous data pipeline and a Streamlit web interface.

title: SIH Grant — INR ₹1,00,000 for Speak It Out
description: Smart India Hackathon 2022: presented Speak It Out at the national level. Secured a Government of India innovation grant of INR 1,00,000 to further develop the conversational empathy model.

title: Student Peace Ambassador — MIT-WPU · UNESCO
description: Appointed Student Peace Ambassador and Speaker at the 8th World Parliament of Science, Religion, and Philosophy — MIT-WPU in association with UNESCO.

title: Nutritional Psychology Paper — Springer Nature
description: Published ML-based nutritional psychology research with the Biology department. Decision Tree on sickness frequency: 98%. Random Forest on BMI: 96.53%. LNEE vol. 1066.

title: Trek Recommendation System — Freelance Project
description: Delivered a freelance ML recommendation system covering 208+ Indian treks using Flask, scikit-learn KNN, and REST API. Sub-second response time. Real-world ML deployment outside academic contexts.

title: Synpulse Internship — BRv7 Certified
description: Interned at Synpulse Management Consulting, Pune. Built a dashboard using Angular, Spring Boot, SQL, and Python for the Business Radar project. Earned BRv7 certification and secured a Pre-Placement Offer.

title: Joined Synpulse — Trainee Analyst
description: Joined Synpulse full-time as Trainee Analyst. Designed a mutual fund system for a leading private bank (Pat on the Back award). Recognised as Star Performer for Syninformation filter work. One of 6 selected across India for internal data analytics certification.

title: Synpulse — Promoted to Analyst
description: Promoted to Analyst at Synpulse. Managed institutional client consulting for a global financial institution — aligned ICM systems with front-office requirements. Worked on Southeast Asian core banking project.

title: IoB Consumer Psychology — Taylor & Francis
description: Published Internet of Behaviors framework. Adults 20–40 drove 72.36% of orders. Instagram averaged 75% engagement. Users spending >2 hours were 45.08% buy-influenced vs 38.53% for <1 hour.

title: E-commerce Behavioral Framework
description: Extended the IoB dataset into a commercial intelligence framework — segmenting by platform × demographic, identifying November (Diwali) as a 13.64% annual order peak, and mapping gender-specific discovery vs. intent signals.

title: ONCP Vision — Protocol for Content Distribution
description: Formulated the Open Network for Content Platform concept after observing father's cable business being structurally bypassed by Jio+Airtel vertical integration. Proposed a five-layer DPI protocol — not a platform, but infrastructure.

title: Synpulse — Promoted to Senior Analyst
description: Promoted to Senior Analyst at Synpulse. Leading large-scale financial system design for global institutions and private banks. Remote.

title: ONCP Architecture Refined
description: Detailed the five protocol layers: Open Content Network API, Shared National CDN, Device-Neutral OS, Aadhaar+UPI Identity, and edge AI compute. Reframed local cable operators from dumb pipes to sovereign infrastructure nodes.

title: Financial Analysis Engine — Personal Market Research
description: Built a RAG pipeline for financial metric extraction applied to personal market analysis. Exploration of the psychology and trading intersection. Private work — no public trace.

title: Sansad — Indian Election Strategy Game (WIP)
description: Designing a browser strategy game simulating Indian Lok Sabha elections across 543 constituencies and 5,000+ candidates. AI advisor and 7-turn campaign mechanics. Active development.

title: TraceAI — Agentic Research Platform (Active)
description: Building TraceAI — an ontology graph powered by Groq LLaMA 3.3 70B with per-node AI reasoning, voice input via Whisper, and a live ReactFlow canvas. Agentic deep research platform. Active development.
